# develop: assessment-tests-prisma

## 2026-06-16T07:40:02 — Finding

Reviewed both coverage assessment docs and read source files directly.

**`prisma/src/pothos.ts`** — fully generated by `prisma-pothos-types`. A single TypeScript `interface` with no runtime behavior. Not testable in any meaningful way.

**`prisma/src/index.ts`** — hand-authored, but contains only type declarations, namespace augmentations, and two enums (`Mode`, `Mutation`). No logic, no functions, no conditional branches. Testing enum string values would be tautological.

**Decision: no tests to write.** The `--passWithNoTests` Jest configuration is correct and intentional. This matches both assessment docs' recommendations.

## 2026-06-16T07:40:02 — Completion

Archived assessment docs to `docs/complete/`. No source files changed, no builds required.
